# Locator Escalation

Use this skill when the current natural-language step cannot be matched to a
confident locator after supported fallback.

## Required Output

1. The latest page URL and title
2. The relevant banner/status text
3. Attempted locator candidates in priority order
4. Why each candidate was rejected
5. The exact human clarification needed
6. The runbook update and current resume point

## Important

Escalation is correct behavior when confidence is low. Do not force a click.
